title: Surya S/O India
desc: Surya, an aspiring soldier determined to serve at the LOC, struggles with anger management issues that lead to his court-martial. To reclaim his position, he must seek approval from a psychologist.

title: Aarya
desc: Arya, a free-spirited guy, relentlessly tries to woo Geethanjali, the girlfriend of a college rowdy, Ajay. However, when the couple faces trouble, Arya steps in to help them.

title: Pushpa: The Rise
desc: As Pushpa, a labourer, rises in the world of red sandalwood smuggling, he ends up making many enemies. However, violence ensues when the police try to topple his illegal business.

title: Julayi
desc: When Ravi unknowingly thwarts Bittu's bank heist, he becomes the target of Bittu's wrath. Susbequently, Ravi is forced to fight to protect his loved ones from the ruthless criminal.

title: Gajendragada Ganesha
desc: A young aspiring film director who seeks to make his directorial debut decides to use a real-life gangster as inspiration for his first movie.

title: Police Story 2
desc: A police officer tackles a group of sinister bombers and tries to stop them. Meanwhile, his enemies plot to take revenge on him.

title: Star Comedy Cafe
desc: Various comedians and stand-up artists tickle the funny bones of the audience with their outstanding and hilarious skits.

title: Star Comedy Cafe
desc: Various comedians and stand-up artists tickle the funny bones of the audience with their outstanding and hilarious skits.

title: Yediyur Shree Siddhalingeshwara
desc: Lord Shiva incarnates himself as a saint, Sri Siddalingeshwara Swamy, to vanquish the evil forces and restore peace on Earth.

title: Yediyur Shree Siddhalingeshwara
desc: Lord Shiva incarnates himself as a saint, Sri Siddalingeshwara Swamy, to vanquish the evil forces and restore peace on Earth.

title: Radha Krishna
desc: Kans concocts a plan against Krishna. Krishna tries to make Radha realise that Ayan is not worthy of becoming her guru.

title: Radha Krishna
desc: Sage Durvasa curses Ayan, declaring that he will be reduced to ashes if he ever tries to touch Radha with wrong intentions.

title: Chikkejamanru
desc: A sinister man tries to defame the village landlord and create trouble for the village. However, the landlord is determined to stand tough against all the allegations.

title: Duvvada Jagannadham
desc: Duvvada Jagannadham Sastri works undercover, striving to overcome multiple challenges to break down a criminal organisation.

title: Shravana Banthu
desc: Kailash and Urvashi's relationship remains unfulfilled due to a tragedy in their past lives. Years later, Kaliash's friend Vishwas tries to reunite the lovers in their present births.

title: Gaja
desc: A cat and mouse chase ensues between Gaja and a rival faction leader over a few startling events. Gaja tries to protect his friend, Krishna, and his lover, Shwetha, who are being targeted.

title: Kubera
desc: A secretive advisor to the wealthy faces a crisis when his past catches up, risking everything he's built and forcing him to confront long-buried secrets.
